message:
fix: Gracefully fall back when _zerobuf module not available

When zerobuf exchange pointer is set but _zerobuf native module isn't
compiled into python.wasm, catch ImportError and fall back to JSON
stdin/stdout mode.

files.patch:
@@ -48,8 +48,11 @@ def _run():
     # Check for zerobuf exchange mode — zero-copy via shared WASM memory
     exchange_ptr = _get_zerobuf_exchange_ptr()
     if exchange_ptr > 0:
-        _run_zerobuf(module_name, exchange_ptr)
-        return
+        try:
+            _run_zerobuf(module_name, exchange_ptr)
+            return
+        except ImportError:
+            pass  # _zerobuf not compiled into this WASM binary, fall back to JSON
 
     # Fallback: JSON stdin/stdout mode
     try:
